Du

Viglet Dumont DEP

Data Exchange Platform — connectors and integrations that ingest, transform and deliver content to search and AI platforms.

Documentation GitHub
AEM
Adobe Experience Manager
Database
JDBC Connector
Web Crawler
Site Ingestion
Assets
File Management

Developer Resources

Everything you need to build data pipelines with Dumont

Documentation

Architecture guides, connector reference, API endpoints, indexing providers and deployment instructions.

Docs

Source Code

Open source under Apache 2.0. Spring Boot 4 backend, React 19 frontend, pluggable indexing (Turing, Solr, Elasticsearch).

Apache 2.0

Viglet Turing ES

The companion Enterprise Search Intelligence Platform — Dumont feeds indexed content into Turing for semantic search and AI.

Ecosystem

Marketplace

Ready-to-use connector samples with sample sites and SPA templates

WKND (AEM)

Adobe Experience Manager connector sample based on the WKND reference site. Ingests pages, assets and metadata from AEM.

AEM Connector

Celestial Gallery (Assets)

Assets connector sample showing astrophotography indexing. Demonstrates file ingestion, metadata extraction and thumbnails.

Assets Connector

Retro Arcade (Database)

JDBC connector sample indexing a retro arcade game catalog. Shows SQL mapping, incremental delta and custom attributes.

DB Connector

Wikipedia (Web Crawler)

Web crawler connector sample ingesting Wikipedia articles. Demonstrates URL filtering, content extraction and link following.

Web Crawler

APIs

Integrate Dumont into your data pipelines

Connector API

POST /api/v2/connector/index
Orchestrates indexing, reindex and audit across all source types.

Source APIs

/api/v2/{aem,db,wc,assets}/source
CRUD plus index/crawl actions, one endpoint per connector type.

AI Summary

GET /api/v2/connector/summary
LLM-powered connector insights proxied through Turing.

Docs GitHub Discussions Turing ES
